intro: Urban Sport runs as a club-first ecosystem with a season rhythm across Grand Baie and Black River rather than a standalone tournament brand.
description: The league layer helps players understand where weekly club play, archive-backed tournaments, and progression all connect. It supports the season calendar while keeping club identity first.
highlights: Category mix spanning M25, M50, M100, M250, mixed, and junior formats
Progression from club sessions into competition touchpoints
